products.overview: The Hei-VAP Expert Control supports precise evaporation workflows with controlled operation, safety-focused design, and laboratory-friendly usability.
features: Designed for precise evaporation and solvent recovery
Control-focused operation for repeatable lab workflows
Suitable for research, QC, and process development laboratories
